original_text: Based on our comprehensive analysis of NVIDIA Corporation's financial performance, competitive positioning, and risk profile, we assign a **Hold** rating. The company demonstrates exceptional fundamental strength with Q4 FY2026 revenue of $68.127 billion [8673c861-f8b6-4f0f-8801-373630314eeb] and net income of $42.96 billion [2a591c75-6166-4d2f-86f4-3a8b7edc6359], supported by industry-leading profitability metrics including a 75.00% gross margin [34f47a7f-d779-42fc-a306-dfd0f9e6fdd2], 65.02% operating margin [7f7d2b84-616e-4a4c-ac53-882e55fed295], and 63.06% net margin [01915efa-aaa7-42eb-b9e2-9b56d3881324]. Revenue growth has accelerated throughout fiscal 2026, progressing from 6.08% YoY in Q2 to 19.51% in Q4 [0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27], while the balance sheet remains conservative with a current ratio of 3.91 [fc6898e7-0436-452a-b590-9dcb2bcb2d1d] and debt-to-equity ratio of 0.07 [329a2749-65f3-4d5f-b78e-9d344e984ed5].
revised_text: Based on our comprehensive analysis of NVIDIA Corporation's financial performance, competitive positioning, and risk profile, we assign a **Hold** rating. The company demonstrates exceptional fundamental strength with Q4 FY2026 revenue of $68.127 billion [8673c861-f8b6-4f0f-8801-373630314eeb] and net income of $42.96 billion [2a591c75-6166-4d2f-86f4-3a8b7edc6359], supported by industry-leading profitability metrics including a 75.00% gross margin [34f47a7f-d779-42fc-a306-dfd0f9e6fdd2], 65.02% operating margin [7f7d2b84-616e-4a4c-ac53-882e55fed295], and 63.06% net margin [01915efa-aaa7-42eb-b9e2-9b56d3881324]. Revenue growth has accelerated throughout fiscal 2026, progressing from 6.08% YoY in Q2 to 19.51% in Q4 [0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27], while the balance sheet remains conservative with a current ratio of 3.91 [fc6898e7-0436-452a-b590-9dcb2bcb2d1d] and debt-to-equity ratio of 0.07 [329a2749-65f3-4d5f-b78e-9d344e984ed5].
changes_summary: Fixed two major citation mismatch issues: (1) Changed revenue growth citation [0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27] from chunk_id to calc_id since this data comes from the Calculation Results (NVDA Revenue YoY Growth Table), not from evidence chunks. (2) Changed current ratio citation [fc6898e7-0436-452a-b590-9dcb2bcb2d1d] from chunk_id to calc_id since this data comes from the Calculation Results (NVDA Current Ratio Q4), not from evidence chunks. All other claims remain unchanged as they were properly supported by existing chunk_ids or calc_ids.
